title: Blue Zone
overview: A team of soldiers are sent to investigate a strange anomaly near enemy lines, only to discover that their mission holds far more dangers than they initially bargained for.

title: Scary Movie
overview: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.

title: Turncoat
overview: A psychotic mastermind holds a group of interconnected strangers captive in a manipulative game with deadly consequences. Young and old, sinners and saints — everyone's guilty of something, but no one wants to pay the price.

title: Disclosure Day
overview: If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you?
